g.text: Backprop the action head through the frozen DiT to get exact sensitivity directions,

text.style: font-size: 9.5px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; fill: #52514e

g.text: then inject them. A lens exists — but it is dense and not DoF-addressable.

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #0b0b0b

g.text: The model's own gradient directions are 20× sharper than noise
